results.overview: Pearl Jam play live at  at Papp László Sportaréna, Budapest, Hungary on July 12th 2022. >> SETLIST: Wash (European tour debut), Why Go, Brain of J. (European tour debut), Corduroy, 1/2 Full (tour debut), Even Flow, Dance of the Clairvoyants, Nothingman, I'm Open (tour debut), I Am Mine (tour debut), Given to Fly, Superblood Wolfmoon, Quick Escape, Black, Do the Evolution, Lukin (slow version), Lukin (fast version), Porch >> ENCORE: Better Man, Crazy Mary (Victoria Williams cover),  State of Love and Trust, Alive, All Along the Watchtower (Bob Dylan cover)
results.title: Pearl Jam: Budapest 2022

results.overview: Pearl Jam play live at Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari, Imola, Italy on June 25th 2022. >> SETLIST: Corduroy, Even Flow, Why Go, Elderly Woman Behind the Counter in a Small Town, Dance of the Clairvoyants, Quick Escape, MFC, Jeremy, Come Back, Save You, Wishlist, Do the Evolution, Seven O'Clock, Daughter (with "People Have the Power" by Patti Smith and "W.M.A." tags), Given to Fly, Superblood Wolfmoon, Lukin, Porch >> ENCORE: State of Love and Trust, Black, Better Man (with "American girl" by Tom Petty and "Beast of Burden" by the Rolling Stones and "Save It for Later), Alive, Yellow Ledbetter
results.title: Pearl Jam: Imola 2022

results.overview: Pearl Jam perform live at Freedom Mortgage Pavilion, Camden, NJ, USA on September 14th 2022. >> SETLIST: Wash, Oceans, Daughter, Hard to Imagine, Animal, Mind Your Manners, Do the Evolution, Deep, Interstellar Overdrive (Pink Floyd cover), Corduroy, Given to Fly, Quick Escape, Retrograde, Even Flow, Untitled, MFC, Not for You (with "Modern Girl" tag), Who Ever Said, Eruption (Van Halen cover), Why Go, Porch >> ENCORE: Inside Job, State of Love and Trust, Breath, Crazy Mary (Victoria Williams cover), Leash, Alive, Rockin' in the Free World (Neil Young cover)
results.title: Pearl Jam: Camden, NJ 2022

results.overview: Pearl Jam perform live in Gila River Arena, Glendale, AZ, USA on May 9th 2022.)  >> PRE-SET:  Far Behind (Eddie Vedder song) (Eddie solo)  >> MAIN SET:  Wash (tour debut),  Given to Fly,  Elderly Woman Behind the Counter in a Small Town,  Corduroy,  Quick Escape,  Why Go,  Superblood Wolfmoon,  Alright (tour debut),  Even Flow,  Dance of the Clairvoyants,  Black (with "We Belong Together" tag),  I Got Id (tour debut),  Red Mosquito (tour debut),  Sleeping by Myself (Eddie Vedder song) (tour debut),  Daughter (with "W.M.A." tag),  Porch  >>  ENCORE:  Smile (tour debut),  Eruption (Van Halen cover), (tour debut),  Do the Evolution,  Better Man ("Save It For Later" tease),  Leaving Here (Eddie Holland cover) (tour debut),  Alive,  Yellow Ledbetter
results.title: Pearl Jam: Gila River Arena 2022

results.overview: Pearl Jam play the first of two nights live at Oakland Arena, Oakland, CA, USA on May 12th 2022.  >> PRE-SET: The Needle and the Damage Done (Neil Young cover) (Eddie solo; first performance since 2016),  I Won't Back Down (Tom Petty cover) (Eddie solo)  >> MAIN SET:  Rockin' in the Free World (Neil Young cover) (Tour debut), Elderly Woman Behind the Counter in a Small Town, Why Go, Corduroy, Quick Escape, Superblood Wolfmoon, Nothingman, Even Flow, Given to Fly, Wishlist, Black, Do the Evolution, Daughter (The Stills-Young Band’s Long May You Run tag),  Not for You (Sleater-Kinney's Modern Girl as outro), Seven O'Clock, Jeremy, Porch >>  ENCORE: You've Got to Hide Your Love Away (The Beatles cover) (first performance since 2016), Better Man, Lukin, Animal (Tour debut), Alive, Baba O'Riley (The Who cover) (Tour debut), Yellow Ledbetter (with a fan “Josh Arroyo” on drums)
results.title: Pearl Jam: Oakland 2022 - Night 1

results.overview: Pearl Jam play the second of two nights live at Oakland Arena, Oakland, CA, USA on May 13th 2022. >> PRE-SET: Throw Your Arms Around Me (Hunters & Collectors cover) (Eddie solo; first time since 2016) >> MAIN SET: Long Road, Given to Fly, Once, Interstellar Overdrive (Pink Floyd cover), Corduroy, Throw Your Hatred Down (Neil Young cover), Quick Escape, Dissident, W.M.A. (first time since 2016), Mind Your Manners, Brain of J., Low Light, Even Flow, Immortality, Do the Evolution, State of Love and Trust, Seven O'Clock, Rearviewmirror >> ENCORE: Bee Girl, Smile, Better Man, Crazy Mary (Victoria Williams cover), Porch, Alive, Baba O'Riley (The Who cover)
results.title: Pearl Jam: Oakland 2022 - Night 2

results.overview: Pearl Jam play the first of two nights live at Kia Forum, Inglewood, CA, USA on May 6th 2022. PRE-SET:  Won't Back Down (Tom Petty cover) (Eddie solo) >> MAIN SET: Of the Girl, Elderly Woman Behind the Counter in a Small Town, Superblood Wolfmoon, Corduroy, Dance of the Clairvoyants, Quick Escape, Faithfull (first time since 2016), Not for You (with Sleater-Kinney's "Modern Girl" intro), Buckle Up, Even Flow, Never Destination, Down, Nothingman, Present Tense, Who Ever Said, Porch >> ENCORE: State of Love and Trust, Wishlist, Do the Evolution, Black, Alive, Yellow Ledbetter
results.title: Pearl Jam: Los Angeles 2022 - Night 1
